subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-11 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God we are in receipt of good news from the Orient. The Orient is exhilarated. The fire of the love of God is ignited everywhere.
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @law of pilgrimage, @martyrs and martyrdom
